headline: Nasire Best 💥🔫 gets 86’d at WH 🏛️ Checkpoint
text: Secret Service 🍯💂‍♂️ just COOKED Nasire Best 🧠😵 21yo DC local 🏙️ who tried to SLIDE into the White House like it’s a VIP club 🎟️🍾! Best pulled a GLOCK 🍆 from his BAG 👜 and started BLASTING 10-20 SHOTS 🔫💥 near 17th & Penn Ave NW 🗺️ right by the Eisenhower Office Building 🏢! Agents returned FIRE 🔥 hit the suspect who got pronounced ☠️ at the hospital 🏥! One unlucky BYSTANDER 😵‍💫 took a STRAY and is in the ER but no update on their STATUS 📊! No agents got TOUCHED 🤕! Best was already on Secret Service RADAR 🛜 after his July 2025 attempt to CRASH the gates 🚪🚫 – he got BUSTED 👮‍♂️ then sent straight to the PSYCH WARD 🧠🛏️! He’d been living in DC for 18 MONTHS 🗓️! Trump 🍊👑 was HOME 🏠 when the fireworks went off but stayed SILENT 🤐 – he’s been BRIEFED 📋! Reporters at the North Lawn got the SPRINT 🏃‍♂️ order straight to the briefing room 🔒 for 30 MINS while Secret Service LOCKED IT DOWN 🔐! Selina Wang 📹 ducked for COVER 🛡️ and Aaron Navarro heard the ECHOES 🔊 like a one-man firing squad! Starbucks ☕ and weekend crowds were still around but the energy was TENSE 😰! This comes only a MONTH after another GUNMAN tried to CRASH the Correspondents’ Dinner 🍽️🔫! Investigation still COOKING 🕵️‍♂️ and roads around the White House staying CLOSED 🚧 overnight! DC security on HIGH ALERT 🚨 and Best’s mental health HISTORY just got another SAD CHAPTER 📖💔!
